project_area: Home safety checks, minor maintenance repairs, and accessibility modifications for low-income elderly and disabled homeowners
demographic_requirements: Age 55+ or have a disability; low-income (≤100% AMI); homeowners or residents in homes owned by family members
eligibility_summary: Open to eligible low-income elderly and disabled homeowners in Maine. Services include home safety checks, minor repairs, and accessibility modifications. Applicants must contact a partner agency serving their area to apply.
